_meta.description: lesson_02 の語彙カード画像生成プロンプト（S列投入用）。master_prompt_design_guide_v2_9_1.py 準拠。v1.1 修正: CONSTRAINTS から 'inside the image' 限定句を除去し 'anywhere — including titles, labels, captions...' の絶対禁止表現に統一。
_meta.change_from_v1_0: CONSTRAINTS 1行目を全語で修正。v2.9.1 Template A/D 準拠。

notes.skin_policy: diverse_unspecified: 肌色フレーズなし
notes.aspect_ratio: GAS経由のためプロンプト本文にアスペクト比指定なし
notes.病院_reuse: word_病院 は lesson_01 と同一語彙。imageStatus を approved にしてスキップ可。
notes.わたし_note: self-pointing gesture（胸に手を当てる）で生成。想定外なら retryImages(['word_わたし']) で再生成。
notes.山_note: vocab_type=concrete_object（遠景ランドマーク設計）。建物グループに分類しない。

vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "時計" (clock) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A round wall clock with a classic white face.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- Large round face occupying 80%+ of the object area — the definitive identifier
- Hour and minute hands pointing to a clear time position (e.g. 3:00)
- 12 hour markers around the face perimeter (simple tick marks or dots)
- Visible outer bezel frame, slightly darker than the face
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: canonical 3/4 view from slightly above — shows face AND one edge of the frame
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Thin tick-mark lines for hour positions. Clean flat white face with navy hand shapes.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
Do NOT add numbers on the clock face (tick marks only). Do NOT render as a wristwatch.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "腕時計" (wristwatch) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A wristwatch with a visible watchband, shown on a simplified wrist.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- Round or rectangular watch face clearly visible from above
- A watchband (leather strap or link bracelet) connecting both sides of the case — THE PRIMARY DIFFERENTIATOR from a wall clock
- Hour and minute hands at a readable position (e.g. 10:10)
- The watch is shown on a simplified flat wrist silhouette
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: canonical 3/4 from slightly above — shows face, case, AND band on wrist simultaneously
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Watchband rendered as a flat strip with crosswise stitch lines. Metallic case edge with thin highlight line.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
The watchband is MANDATORY — without it, this looks identical to a clock (時計). Render the wrist as a simple flat schematic silhouette — no anatomical detail, no skin texture.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "ペン" (pen (ballpoint pen)) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A ballpoint pen — a smooth cylindrical writing instrument.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A smooth cylindrical body with a pointed writing tip at the bottom
- A clip attached to the side of the cap — the key identifier distinguishing it from a pencil
- A cap fitted over the top end (can be shown with cap on or off)
- Uniform smooth surface with NO hexagonal facets (that is a pencil)
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 view — shows the barrel length, tip, AND clip simultaneously
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Thin specular highlight line running the length of the barrel. Clip rendered as a flat strip.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
DO NOT add hexagonal facets on the barrel (that is a pencil). DO NOT add an eraser tip (that is a pencil).

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "鉛筆" (pencil) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A standard yellow wooden pencil.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- HEXAGONAL cross-section body — six flat facets clearly visible along the barrel
- A sharpened wooden cone tip at the bottom exposing the graphite core
- A pink eraser plug at the very top, secured by a metallic ferrule band
- Yellow body color (standard Japanese school pencil)
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 view — shows hexagonal facets, sharpened tip, AND eraser end
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Thin edge lines showing hexagonal facets. Warm wood-grain suggestion on the exposed cone tip. Metallic ferrule rendered with a thin highlight ring.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
The hexagonal cross-section is MANDATORY — without it, it looks like a pen. The pink eraser tip is MANDATORY — it distinguishes this from a pen.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "ケータイ" (mobile phone / smartphone) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A modern smartphone showing the front screen face.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- App icon grid visible on the screen — small rounded-square colored icons in a 3×4 grid layout
- Status bar at the very top of the screen showing simplified signal/battery icons
- A camera notch or punch-hole at the top center of the screen
- Thin metallic or glass frame around the screen edges
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 view from above — shows screen face AND one narrow side edge
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Thin diagonal white highlight line across the top-right of the screen — glass surface. Metallic thin frame line along device edges.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
DO NOT render as a plain black rectangle with no screen content. App icon grid is MANDATORY as the primary screen identifier.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "本" (book) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A hardcover or softcover book.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A clearly visible thick spine with visible stacked page edges on the opposite side
- Hard or soft cover with a distinct rectangular cover design (color block or simple pattern — NO text)
- Significantly thicker than a magazine — the page stack depth is a key identifier
- A bookmark ribbon or fabric tail hanging from the top of the spine (optional but recommended)
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 view — shows cover face AND spine AND page edges simultaneously
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Page edge lines visible as many thin horizontal parallel lines stacked on the side. Subtle binding crease along the spine edge.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
DO NOT confuse with magazine (must be thick with page edges visible). DO NOT add a masthead banner (that is a magazine).

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "雑誌" (magazine) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A glossy print magazine.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A bold masthead/title banner printed across the very top of the cover — THE SINGLE STRONGEST IDENTIFIER
  (render as a colored rectangular banner strip with abstract geometric shapes — NO actual text letters)
- Multiple coverline areas in different font-size blocks layered over a cover image
  (render as horizontal colored bars of different widths — NO actual text)
- Visibly thin compared to a book — thin spine depth
- Glossy cover surface
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 view from slightly above — shows front cover AND spine thickness
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Subtle curved lines at the bottom edge of pages suggesting glossy paper flex. Faint saddle-stitch line along the spine center.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
MASTHEAD BANNER is MANDATORY — without it, this looks like a book or notebook. Render the banner as a solid colored strip, NOT as actual letter characters. Spine must be visibly thin (not as thick as a book).

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "新聞" (newspaper) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A large-format newspaper folded in half.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- Large broadsheet format — significantly wider than a magazine or book
- Multi-column layout visible on the face: parallel vertical lines suggesting columns
  (render as thin vertical line groups — NO actual text)
- Folded in half horizontally with a visible bold fold crease across the middle
- One large rectangular area at top suggesting a headline block (darker tone)
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: slight 3/4 from above — shows the fold crease, column layout, AND large format size
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Matte uncoated paper texture — no glossy highlights. Slightly uneven/wavy page edges suggesting newsprint.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
Large broadsheet format is MANDATORY — must look clearly larger than a magazine. Column lines are MANDATORY — render as parallel thin lines, NOT as text. DO NOT make it glossy (that is a magazine).

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "かばん" (bag (shoulder bag / briefcase)) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A shoulder bag or structured handbag/briefcase.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A clearly visible carrying handle or shoulder strap — the primary bag identifier
- A main body compartment with a zipper or clasp closure at the top
- Dashed stitching lines along the seams and edges — leather/fabric texture identifier
- Optional: one front exterior pocket with a zipper or snap
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 view from slightly above — shows front face, handle/strap, AND one side gusset
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Dashed stitching lines on all main seams. Metallic zipper pull tab rendered as a small oblong shape.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
The shoulder strap or handle is MANDATORY — without it, it looks like a box or book.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "消しゴム" (eraser) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A rectangular plastic eraser block.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- Compact rectangular block shape — notably smaller than a book or phone
- A light smudge or usage mark on one face — indicating it is a used eraser
- Clean flat top surface, slightly worn lower face from use
- Wrapper sleeve partially peeled back on one end (the standard Japanese eraser wrapper)
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 from slightly above — shows the top face, one long side, AND the wrapper end
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Subtle fine scratch marks on the bottom face suggesting rubber wear. Wrapper rendered with thin edge lines — slight paper texture.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
The usage smudge/wear marks are MANDATORY — without them, it looks like a plain white block. The partially peeled wrapper is MANDATORY — it is the key identifier for a Japanese eraser.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "山" (mountain) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A single large mountain viewed from a distance — a natural landmark.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A tall triangular or gently curved silhouette rising from a flat ground line
- A snow-capped white peak at the summit — the clearest natural landmark identifier
- Visible slope texture: gentle diagonal line patterns suggesting rocky/grassy surface
- Clear sky background (pale blue or cream) behind the mountain
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: straight front view or very slight 3/4 — shows the full triangular silhouette from base to peak
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Gentle diagonal lines on slopes for texture. Clean white snow cap with sharp boundary. Soft color gradient-free sky as a flat pale blue field.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
Snow cap is MANDATORY — it is the primary visual identifier for a mountain. The mountain must be clearly a NATURAL LANDMARK, not a building or hill.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "犬" (dog) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A friendly medium-sized dog — a recognizable domestic dog.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- Floppy ears on either side of the head — the most universally recognized dog feature
- An upward-curving tail suggesting friendliness
- Four paws clearly visible on a flat ground plane
- A simple dog collar around the neck
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 front view at eye level — shows face, ears, body, tail, AND all four paws
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: Short fur texture suggested by thin curved stroke lines on the body. Collar rendered with a simple thin band and small tag shape.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
Floppy ears and visible collar are MANDATORY — they mark this as a domestic dog, not a wolf or cat.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly and UNAMBIGUOUSLY communicate the meaning of "写真" (photograph / photo) at a glance.
A learner must distinguish this object from similar-shaped objects without any text clues.

[SUBJECT]
The subject is: A printed photograph held up or displayed.
Visual signature (distinctive identifying details — DO NOT OMIT):
- A rectangular print with a clear white border/margin frame — the photograph border is ESSENTIAL
- A simple scene visible inside the photo (e.g. a mountain landscape or a smiling person silhouette)
  — rendered as a simplified flat illustration within the frame, NOT photorealistic
- The photo is shown slightly tilted or held at an angle to indicate it is a physical print object
- Optional: a subtle drop in flatness at corners suggesting curled photo paper
These signature details are the primary means of identification. Render them clearly.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Display strategy: OBJECT_ALONE
The object is centered and fills 70-80% of the image.
Camera angle: 3/4 view from slightly above — shows the photo face AND one narrow edge thickness
Iconization level: Detailed Flat (level 3).
Include symbolic material texture hints: White border frame rendered as a flat rectangle. Inner image as a simple flat color scene. Slight corner curl lines at one or two corners.
These are symbolic (not photorealistic) — thin lines, dashes, or highlights to suggest material.
No actual shading or gradients.
Solid white background. No additional objects or context scene.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
White border frame is MANDATORY — it is the primary photo identifier. Inner image must be abstract/simplified — NOT photorealistic. DO NOT render any faces with recognizable features inside the photo.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The building must be IMMEDIATELY and UNAMBIGUOUSLY recognizable as a modern office building / commercial building at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is a tall modern multi-story office or commercial building — clearly urban and professional.
A single short Japanese signage word 「ビル」 is mounted clearly near the entrance.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue or soft cream sky background.

Functional cues — 3 anchors required:
- Entrance cue: a wide glass-paneled entrance lobby visible on the ground floor, revolving or automatic doors
- User action cue: office workers in business attire entering or exiting, one holding a briefcase
- Surrounding anchor: a company nameplate or directory board beside the entrance, potted trees at the base

The building fills 70% of the frame. Negative space in the top one-third for typography.
Entrance and functional cues are clearly visible.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white or pale sky-blue background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm colors for the building facade,
warm amber gold for accent details.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
EXCEPTION (per 資料8): A single short Japanese building name signage is permitted —
limited to ONE word only, small, mounted on the building entrance.
No other text, letters, numbers, or symbols anywhere in the image.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

vocabulary._note: lesson_01 と同一語彙。画像流用可。imageStatus を approved に設定してスキップしてもよい。
vocabulary.prompt:
[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The building must be IMMEDIATELY and UNAMBIGUOUSLY recognizable as a hospital at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is a medium to large hospital building with a calm, clean exterior.
A single short Japanese signage word 「病院」 is mounted clearly near the entrance.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue or soft cream sky background.

Functional cues — 3 anchors required:
- Entrance cue: a covered entrance canopy with a wheelchair ramp beside the main door
- User action cue: a medical staff member in scrubs near the entrance, one patient with a family member
- Surrounding anchor: an ambulance bay or emergency vehicle space at the side

The building fills 70% of the frame. Negative space in the top one-third for typography.
Entrance and functional cues are clearly visible.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white or pale sky-blue background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm colors for the building facade,
warm amber gold for accent details.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
EXCEPTION (per 資料8): A single short Japanese building name signage is permitted —
limited to ONE word only, small, mounted on the building entrance.
No other text, letters, numbers, or symbols anywhere in the image.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The building must be IMMEDIATELY and UNAMBIGUOUSLY recognizable as a city hall / municipal office at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
The main subject is a solid authoritative government-style building — broader and more formal than an office building.
A single short Japanese signage word 「市役所」 is mounted clearly near the entrance.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Viewed from a slight three-quarter front angle at eye level, 35mm wide-angle lens equivalent.
Straight vertical lines, natural perspective with no fisheye distortion.
Pale blue or soft cream sky background.

Functional cues — 3 anchors required:
- Entrance cue: a wide set of stone steps leading up to a formal entrance with columns or pilasters
- User action cue: citizens walking up the steps, one holding papers or documents
- Surrounding anchor: a public notice board and flagpoles in front of the building

The building fills 70% of the frame. Negative space in the top one-third for typography.
Entrance and functional cues are clearly visible.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white or pale sky-blue background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm colors for the building facade,
warm amber gold for accent details.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
EXCEPTION (per 資料8): A single short Japanese building name signage is permitted —
limited to ONE word only, small, mounted on the building entrance.
No other text, letters, numbers, or symbols anywhere in the image.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "人" (person) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A completely generic adult figure in plain, neutral, non-role-specific casual clothes — simple top and trousers or skirt. No professional props, no bags, no accessories. The figure must read as 'a person' in general, not as any specific role or nationality. No flag badge. No job-specific clothing.
Pose and expression: Standing in a simple neutral pose — arms relaxed at sides, weight evenly distributed. Calm neutral expression. The figure should feel 'universal' — no specific personality.
The character's role must be immediately obvious from clothing, posture, and props alone.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — the camera is positioned at the
subject's eye height (not above, not below) and rotated approximately 30-45 degrees
to one side. Diagonal front view showing both the front face and a partial side view
simultaneously. DO NOT use an overhead angle. Keep both feet visible on a flat ground plane.
Solid white background. No other characters or objects in the frame.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.

[PURPOSE]
Create a vocabulary card illustration for Japanese language learning materials.
The image must instantly communicate the meaning of "わたし" (I (first-person pronoun)) at a glance.

[SUBJECT]
A generic adult figure in plain casual clothes. The figure is performing a self-referential gesture: ONE HAND PLACED FLAT ON THEIR OWN CHEST, palm facing inward toward themselves. This is the universal 'pointing at myself' gesture in Japanese. No other props, no bags, no role-specific clothing.
Pose and expression: Standing with one hand placed flat on the chest (自分を指す self-pointing gesture). Calm, self-aware expression with a slight inward focus. The gesture must be clearly visible and unambiguous — this is the SOLE visual cue for the first-person pronoun concept.
The character's role must be immediately obvious from clothing, posture, and props alone.

[SCENE & ACTION]
Full-body shot. The character is centered and fills 70-80% of the image area.
Camera angle: HORIZONTAL 3/4 view at EYE LEVEL — the camera is positioned at the
subject's eye height (not above, not below) and rotated approximately 30-45 degrees
to one side. Diagonal front view showing both the front face and a partial side view
simultaneously. DO NOT use an overhead angle. Keep both feet visible on a flat ground plane.
Solid white background. No other characters or objects in the frame.
85mm portrait lens equivalent.

[STYLE RECIPE — DO NOT CHANGE]
Minimalist flat vector illustration. Clean continuous black outlines with consistent line weight.
Completely flat solid color fills only. Color palette: soft cream white background,
deep slate navy outlines, muted warm blue and warm amber gold as accents.
This should look like it belongs in a brand style guide, not like AI art. Keep line weights consistent.

[CONSTRAINTS]
No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols anywhere — including titles, labels, captions,
or any text overlay at any position in the rendered output.
No gradients, no shadows, no 3D effects, no photoreal textures.
Apply zero ambient lighting, zero drop shadows, zero global illumination.
